title: Central Continent
content:
The 
Central Continent
 is the capital of the Celestial Clan. It is where the Imperial Palace is located and home to the Celestial Emperor 
Lian Daozhen
, Imperial Teacher, and Grand Empyrean 
Jiu Di
. 

Due to the presence of two of the strongest 
Grand Empyreans
 in the 
Celestial Clan
 and the 
Dao Sect
 within its borders, even Grand Empyreans from the 
Ancient Clan
 would not dare to invade it.

Overview
[
]

The Central Continent is the primary continent of the 
Celestial Clan
 and as such contains vast Celestial Energy that permeates throughout its borders. At the center of the continent is the Imperial City, whose majesty surpasses that of any of the Royal Capitals in the 
Ancient Clan
.

The Imperial City is controlled directly by the Celestial Royal Family, specifically, the Celestial Emperor and by extension the Imperial Teacher. Despite this, powerful Celestials such as 
Jiu Di
 have a degree of autonomy and authority within it. 

The Imperial City spans a large amount of territory, comparable to the size of a continent. It is divided into five quadrants, North, East, South, West, and Central. Each quadrant is ruled by a Mansion Family, with the exception of the central which houses the Imperial Palace and the Royal Family. There are also no mortals in the Imperial City as the Celestial Energy is so thick that it is impossible for them to live.

North - 
Li Mansion
 (
Li Guang
's Clan)

East - 
Meng Mansion

South - 
Luo Mansion

West - 
Shan Mansion

Central - Royal Family 

Between the East and West quadrants is 
Mount Emperor
, which is home to Grand Empyrean 
Jiu Di
. Due to his presence, it is revered and respected by the 
Celestial Clan
 just as much as the Imperial Family.

Dao Sect
[
]

Within the continent there is only a singular sect, which is tied directly to the Celestial Royal Family. In the sect, the current Celestial Emperor is the undisputed ruler and the current Imperial Teacher is the Sect Master. The name of the sect is constantly changes, with each subsequent generation Celestial Emperor adjusting it to their liking upon their coronation and inheriting the 
Celestial Ancestor
's Eight Extreme Dao. 

Under 
Lian Daozhen
, this sect was known as the 
Dao Sect
.

The location of the sect is largely unknown to the majority of the 
Celestial Clan
. Over the years, many have speculated its location with the most popular theories being;

Within a hidden void that overlapped the city

Within a spatial rift contained in the Imperial Palace

Deep beneath the underground of the city

It is rumored by many in the 
Celestial Clan
 that the primary focus of the sect currently is to suppress the power and influence of 
Mount Emperor
 and Grand Empyrean 
Jiu Di
.

Imperial Palace
[
]

The Imperial Palace is the primary residence of the Celestial Royal Family and is where the current Celestial Emperor commonly resides and cultivates when not conducting official business.

Within the palace is a secret cultivation ground where one can receive the inheritance of the 
Celestial Ancestor
. It is also where the seals containing the 72 Beasts that were sealed away by the Celestial Ancestor are located.
